scripts.SASS-COMMENT: pnpm run sass:watch : This compiles the SASS to CSS in watch mode  |  pnpm run sass:build : This compiles the SASS to CSS once only
scripts.TEST-COMMENT: pnpm run test : This runs the AUTOMATED TESTS
scripts.LINTING-COMMENT: pnpm run lint : This runs LINTING with automatic fixing enabled (use this if you want to run linting in terminal, but recommended you instead do this in your IDE directly)
scripts.WATCH-COMMENT: pnpm run watch : This runs the WATCH for development, checking for Typescript errors in real time
scripts.BUILD-COMMENT: pnpm run build : This runs the BUILD for deployment (no need to do this manually, as it's part of Bitbucket Pipelines and Vercel Deployments)
scripts.build: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run sass:build && next build
